fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan OR FD-258 hard card via mail

seo.title: Hawaii CNA Certification Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your Certification (2026)
seo.description: Already certified as a CNA? Here's whether your certification transfers to Hawaii - endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: CNA license reciprocity hawaii, how to transfer CNA license to hawaii, hawaii CNA endorsement application

board.name: Hawaii Dept of Health
board.mailing_address:
Professional and Vocational Licensing Division
Department of Commerce and Consumer Affairs
P. O. Box 3469
Honolulu, HI 96801

license_types.title: Certified Nursing Assistant (CNA)
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a nursing assistant in Hawaii.

steps.title: Review the Candidate Information Bulletin (CIB)
steps.description: Access and thoroughly read the current Hawaii Nurse Aide Candidate Information Bulletin (CIB) available on the Prometric Hawaii Nurse Aide Registry website for detailed instructions, eligibility requirements, and exam content.

steps.title: Submit an Online Application
steps.description: Visit the Prometric Hawaii Nurse Aide Registry website, navigate to the 'Online Application' section, create a candidate account, and complete and submit the application for the Nurse Aide Competency Evaluation.

steps.title: Schedule the Competency Evaluation
steps.description: Once your application is processed and you receive an Authorization to Test (ATT) email from Prometric, schedule your written/oral and skills competency evaluation exams through the Prometric online system or by phone.

steps.title: Pass the Competency Evaluation Exams
steps.description: Successfully complete both the written (or oral) and skills portions of the Nurse Aide Competency Evaluation administered by Prometric.

steps.title: Placement on the Registry
steps.description: Upon successful completion of both exams, your name will be added to the Hawaii Nurse Aide Registry, and you will receive a certificate from Prometric. Your certification is then viewable via the DCCA PVL license search.

documents.detail: Certificate of completion from your approved CNA training program.
Official verification of passing your state's nurse aide competency evaluation.

provisional_text: Some states allow CNAs to work under supervision for a limited period while their endorsement application is being processed.
reciprocity_text: CNAs certified in another state can often apply via endorsement (reciprocity) by providing registry verification from their home state.

faqs.question: How much does Hawaii CNA endorsement cost?
faqs.answer: The endorsement application fee is $25. Additional costs may include background check fees.

faqs.question: Is a background check required?
faqs.answer: Yes, a fingerprint-based background check is required in Hawaii.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my CNA certification to Hawaii?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 2 to 4 Weeks.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Hawaii while waiting?
faqs.answer: Check with the state board about temporary practice permits while your endorsement is being processed.

reciprocity.notes: CNAs certified in another state can often apply via endorsement (reciprocity) by providing registry verification from their home state.

variants.label: New Applicant
variants.description: How to become a CNA in HI.

variants.label: Reciprocity
variants.description: Transfer an active out-of-state CNA to Hawaii.

hero.title: Become a CNA in Hawaii
hero.dek: Applicants for CNA licensure in Hawaii must apply through the **Prometric Hawaii Nurse Aide Registry** online system, which manages the competency evaluation and maintains the Nurse Aide Registry for the Hawaii Department of Commerce and Consumer Affairs (DCCA).

seo.title: How to Become a CNA in Hawaii
seo.description: Step-by-step guide to Hawaii CNA certification.

official_links.registration_steps: Visit the Prometric Hawaii Nurse Aide Registry website, click on 'Online Application', and create a candidate account to submit your application for the Nurse Aide Competency Evaluation.
